message:
multi-thread WASM build: pii-mt.wasm + sharedMemorySupported() + loadPiiWasmShared()

Foundation for multi-threaded inference:

- New build target build:zig-mt produces dist/pii-mt.wasm with the
  WASM atomics + bulk_memory features and an imported (rather than
  exported) shared linear memory. Same kernels as the single-thread
  pii.wasm but instantiable via WebAssembly.Memory({ shared: true }),
  which is what Workers need to share a single 770 MB weight buffer.
- inline-wasm.mjs emits both binaries as Uint8Array literals
  (PII_WASM_BYTES + PII_WASM_MT_BYTES). Bundle size: 1.82 MB → 2.47 MB
  (one extra mt build worth of bytes).
- Public API additions:
  - sharedMemorySupported() — feature-detects SAB + cross-origin
    isolation. Returns true on Node always, true on browsers only
    when COOP/COEP headers are set.
  - loadPiiWasm() / loadPiiWasmShared() — re-exported from index.ts
    so power users / workers can instantiate the engine directly.

What this does NOT do yet: spawn workers. The mt-WASM is reachable
from JS but no kernel call is parallelized. The next step is a
worker pool that takes a shared WebAssembly.Memory and runs kernel
calls in parallel — landing as a follow-up.

Verified:
- Single-thread (pii.wasm): existing tests pass unchanged. Node
  forward returns same spans, browser smoke + webgpu-smoke + public-
  api still 2/2 spans agreed.
- Multi-thread (pii-mt.wasm): instantiates with shared memory, basic
  kernels (echo, sum_i32, alloc) return identical results to the
  single-thread build. memory.buffer is SharedArrayBuffer.

files.patch:
@@ -36,8 +36,12 @@
   "license": "Apache-2.0",
   "scripts": {
     "build": "npm run build:zig && npm run build:opt && node scripts/inline-wasm.mjs && bun build src/js/index.ts --outdir dist --target browser --format esm --sourcemap=external && bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly",
-    "build:zig": "mise exec -- zig build-exe -target wasm32-freestanding -mcpu=generic+simd128+relaxed_simd -O ReleaseFast -fstrip -flto src/zig/wasm_exports.zig -cflags -O3 -mrelaxed-simd -flto -- src/c/fma.c --name pii -fno-entry -rdynamic && mv pii.wasm dist/",
-    "build:opt": "wasm-opt -O3 --strip-producers --strip-target-features dist/pii.wasm -o dist/pii.wasm --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals --enable-relaxed-simd --inlining-optimizing --always-inline-max-function-size 256 --flexible-inline-max-function-size 512 --inline-functions-with-loops",
+    "build:zig": "npm run build:zig-st && npm run build:zig-mt",
+    "build:zig-st": "mise exec -- zig build-exe -target wasm32-freestanding -mcpu=generic+simd128+relaxed_simd -O ReleaseFast -fstrip -flto src/zig/wasm_exports.zig -cflags -O3 -mrelaxed-simd -flto -- src/c/fma.c --name pii -fno-entry -rdynamic && mv pii.wasm dist/",
+    "build:zig-mt": "mise exec -- zig build-exe -target wasm32-freestanding -mcpu=generic+simd128+relaxed_simd+atomics+bulk_memory -O ReleaseFast -fstrip -flto src/zig/wasm_exports.zig -cflags -O3 -mrelaxed-simd -flto -- src/c/fma.c --shared-memory --import-memory --initial-memory=4194304 --max-memory=2147483648 --name pii-mt -fno-entry -rdynamic && mv pii-mt.wasm dist/",
+    "build:opt": "npm run build:opt-st && npm run build:opt-mt",
+    "build:opt-st": "wasm-opt -O3 --strip-producers --strip-target-features dist/pii.wasm -o dist/pii.wasm --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals --enable-relaxed-simd --inlining-optimizing --always-inline-max-function-size 256 --flexible-inline-max-function-size 512 --inline-functions-with-loops",
+    "build:opt-mt": "wasm-opt -O3 --strip-producers --strip-target-features dist/pii-mt.wasm -o dist/pii-mt.wasm --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals --enable-relaxed-simd --enable-threads --inlining-optimizing --always-inline-max-function-size 256 --flexible-inline-max-function-size 512 --inline-functions-with-loops",
     "typecheck": "bun x tsc --noEmit",
     "test": "bun x playwright test",
     "test:zig": "mise exec -- zig test src/zig/math.zig",
